title: Shells Town Under Morgan’s Fear
description: On pages 1–4, this part centers on Zoro’s endurance, Helmeppo’s cruelty, and Luffy’s decision to recruit the captured swordsman.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Tell me! Where are Zolo's swords!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: S-Stop dragging me and I'll tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WE PASSED IT A LONG WAY BACK.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: YOU SHOULD'VE TOLD ME! YOU'RE WASTING TIME!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: DROP THE CAPTAIN'S SON OR WE'LL SHOOT!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: HE'S USING HELPPOPO AS A SHILED!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: BUT... HFF hFF... I haven't untied you...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: DON'T WORRY ABOUT ME. I JUST HAVE TO SURVIVE THE MONTH AND THEY'LL LET ME GO,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: THEY'RE NOT GOING TOLET YOU GO!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: YOU'RE GOING TO BE EXECUTED THREE DAYS FROM NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WHAT ARE YOU SAYING!!? THAT IDIOT PROM- ISED ME! IF I SURVIVE HERE FOR A MONTH, I'LL BE SET FREE!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He never intended to keep that promise!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Because he found out Helmeppo lied to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: THE Navy IS YOUR ENEMY NOW!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
